hero.tag: Homestay · Đà Lạt · Central Highlands · Vietnam
hero.title:
Where
travelersfind home.
hero.subtitle: A trail runner's homestay in the cloud-wrapped mountains of Dalat. 1,500m altitude, rooms from 450,000 VND/night, and a team that speaks your language — whether that's vert, cà phê, or both.
rooms.label: Our Spaces
rooms.heading:
A room for every
kind of traveler.
rooms.intro: From intimate private rooms to our social dormitory — each space at Trạm CP12 is designed with intention. Natural materials, local craft, and exactly the kind of light that makes you want to stay another night.
explore.label: From Our Doorstep
explore.heading: What guests discover nearby.
explore.card1.name: Hồ Xuân Hương
explore.card1.highlight: Active recovery done right. Start with an easy, crisp 5km shakeout run around the lake. At 1,500m elevation, a morning jog here hits different.
explore.card2.name: Vườn Hoa Thành Phố Đà Lạt
explore.card2.highlight: The city's iconic flower park overlooking Xuan Huong Lake. Features hundreds of flower species including hydrangeas, orchids, and roses perfectly curated.
explore.card3.name: Đỉnh núi Langbiang
explore.card3.highlight: 2,167m - The Roof of Da Lat. Skip the easy Radar Peak road to tackle the real 10.6km loop up Ba Mountain. That last 360m push with 717m total elevation gain tests every muscle.
explore.card4.name: Chợ đêm thành phố Đà Lạt
explore.card4.highlight: Swap your trail shoes for sandals. Replenish your calories with authentic bánh tráng nướng and hot soy milk in the chilly mountain air after a big hike.
explore.card5.name: Đồi chè Cầu Đất Đà Lạt
explore.card5.highlight: Dial in the vert for Dalat Ultra Trail! The 20.7-mile loop transitions from smooth dirt roads to technical rocky descents. Log 1,200m D+ before the heat hits.
explore.card6.name: Thiền viện Trúc Lâm Đà Lạt
explore.card6.highlight: Take the cable car up; earn the 4km pine-trail descent back to town. Fully runnable with switchbacks — time it early morning before tour groups hit the trail.
about.label: About CP12
about.heading:
Not just a bed.
A base camp.
about.p1: Trạm CP12 was born from a simple frustration: too many Đà Lạt stays felt like transactions. You'd arrive, sleep, leave — and miss the actual city entirely.
about.p2: We built something different. A place run by locals, designed for connection, and obsessively curated for solo travelers who want the real Đà Lạt — not the brochure version.
about.perk1.title: Local expertise, freely shared
about.perk1.desc: Hand-drawn route maps with elevation profiles, Strava segment tips, and hosts who've logged hundreds of km on these very trails.
about.perk2.title: Built for runners
about.perk2.desc: Breakfast before long runs, gear drying racks, cold-rinse station, and a recovery corner with muscle rub, and herbal teas.
about.perk3.title: Solo-traveler focused
about.perk3.desc: Free group trail runs during the week, sharing route information, and a dorm where runners naturally find each other.
about.pullQuote.text: We don't sell sleep. We sell the morning after.
about.pullQuote.author: — CP12 Team
journal.label: The CP12 Journal
journal.heading: Stories from the trail.
journal.subtext: Local insights, runner guides, hidden spots, and honest travel advice — straight from the CP12 team and the people who've stayed with us.
journal.card1.title: Dalat for Runners: Your Complete Trail Guide from Trạm CP12
journal.card1.excerpt: Dalat is trail running's best-kept secret in Southeast Asia — 1,500m altitude, cool air year-round, and 50km of singletrack within 30 minutes of CP12. Here's every route, graded.
journal.card2.title: How to Feel at Home at Trạm CP12
journal.card2.excerpt: There's a particular kind of freedom in traveling alone. Our dorm, morning walks, and weekly Trạm Nights are designed so connections happen naturally.
journal.card3.title: Dalat's Hidden Gems: Beyond the Tourist Trail
journal.card3.excerpt: Skip the brochures. Our team reveals hidden cafés, backstreet food stalls, and underground arts you won't find on TripAdvisor.

location.label: Find Us
location.heading: At the edge of the city.
location.intro: 228/6 Đường Phú Đồng Thiên Vương, Phường 8, Đà Lạt — 3km from the center, 10 minutes from the night market, and right beside some of the best trails in the highlands.

faq.label: Common Questions
faq.heading: Everything you need to know.
faq.q1.question: Is parking available?
faq.q1.answer: Yes — free motorbike and car parking is available on-site.
faq.q2.question: Is breakfast included?
faq.q2.answer: Breakfast is not included. The shared kitchen has a rice cooker, kettle, pots, and fridge — fully usable by all guests.
faq.q3.question: Is there hot water?
faq.q3.answer: Yes — all rooms have hot water showers with electric heaters. Reliable year-round.
faq.q5.question: What are check-in and check-out times?
faq.q5.answer: Check-in from 14:00. Check-out by 12:00. Early check-in or late check-out is available on request — just message us.
faq.q6.question: Can I store luggage after check-out?
faq.q6.answer: Yes — free luggage storage until 18:00 on your check-out day. Just let us know.
faq.q8.question: What is the deposit and cancellation policy?
faq.q8.answer: We hold your room with a small deposit via bank transfer. Cancellations with 48+ hours notice receive a full refund. Message us on Zalo or Facebook for details.
faq.q9.question: Do you rent motorbikes?
faq.q9.answer: We don't rent motorbikes directly, but we can provide trusted local contacts for you to rent from.
faq.q10.question: Are pets allowed?
faq.q10.answer: Yes, we are pet-friendly! We have a shared pet area. Please bring your own pet accessories and bedding.
faq.q11.question: Do the rooms have heaters?
faq.q11.answer: Yes, our rooms are equipped with heaters to keep you warm during the chilly Đà Lạt nights.
faq.q12.question: Is there a curfew?
faq.q12.answer: There is no curfew. After check-in, you will be given a password for 24/7 independent access to the homestay.
faq.q13.question: Are towels and toiletries provided?
faq.q13.answer: Yes, essential toiletries and towels are provided. Please refer to your specific room details for a full list of amenities.
rules.label: House Rules
rules.heading:
Policies for a
peaceful stay.
rules.general.title: General Rules & Quiet Hours
rules.general.desc: Quiet Time is strictly enforced from 10:00 PM to 7:00 AM. Please keep voices, music, and TV volumes low. Check-in from 14:00, check-out by 12:00. Turn off AC and lights when leaving.
rules.kitchen.title: Shared Kitchen & BBQ Area
rules.kitchen.desc: Clean all dishes and the grill immediately after use. Return items to their original places. Do not move furniture. A cleaning penalty of 200,000 VND applies if left uncleaned.
rules.karaoke.title: Karaoke & Entertainment
rules.karaoke.desc: All Karaoke and loud music must completely stop by 9:30 PM. Please close doors and windows while singing.
rules.laundry.title: Laundry & Wash Area
rules.laundry.desc: Operating hours: 7:00 AM to 9:30 PM. Please promptly remove clothes once the cycle is complete. Fee: 50,000 VND / wash & dry.
rules.smoking.title: Smoking Policy
rules.smoking.desc: Smoking is 100% prohibited indoors. Designated outdoor areas only. Please maintain general cleanliness.
rules.garden.title: Garden & Outdoor Areas
rules.garden.desc: Please respect our plants and landscaping. Do not pick flowers or branches. Clean up any trash after enjoying the outdoor spaces.
